violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (serving spoons) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The door to the outside, located at the side of the building near the stairway, is not tight-fitting. Spaces observed at the bottom corners. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees who have successfully completed an approved course in food safety management. Application has been provided to register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. Management is in the process of completing the application and will notify inspector once an employee has been registered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (strainer) were observed with an accumulation of lettuce and debris after ware washing. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee cleaned and sanitized the strainer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. A spray bottle of chemicals was observed unlabeled. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Raw frozen shrimp was observed thawing in prep sink in stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Thermometers in walk-in cooler and display case are inaccurate and do not display proper temperature. New thermometers are needed in aforementioned units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The door to the outside, located next to dry storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies in the sink and dry storage areas. No food was observed to be impacted by presence of flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC is to contact pest control today and increase services as needed to eliminate the current presence of insects. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The presence of a splash guard was lacking on one side of handwashing sink next to the prep sink. The presence of splash guards is necessary on both sides of the sink to prevent contamination. The establishment is to install an additional splash guard on the other side of the handwashing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored and slightly warped. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
Hot-hold unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Door gaskets must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The handwashing sink in front service area was observed to have a leak coming from the drain evidenced by the presence of water on the floor and a small hotel pan that employees had placed under sink to catch leaking water. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
